title: HoloBuild Action Boundary Test Spec

test_status_labels.MUST_PASS_NOW: Repo should already support this invariant or the test should be fixture-backed.
test_status_labels.EXPECTED_FAIL_UNTIL_FIXED: Pressure-test plan identified a current gap; test should fail until fixed or explicitly blocked.
test_status_labels.SPEC_ONLY_NEW_GATE: New gate expected for product readiness; implementation may not exist yet.
test_status_labels.NO_PROVIDER: Use fixtures, monkeypatching, static inspection, stored traces, or pure functions only.
test_status_labels.NO_PRODUCTION_ACTION: Do not call deploy, publish, freeze real artifacts, providers, judges, or ledger-mutating commands.

gates.name: Artifact-build vs execution boundary
gates.goal: Prove HoloBuild outputs are candidate artifacts and evidence packages, not autonomous actions.

tests.name: test_holobuild_packet_terminal_status_does_not_execute_action
pass_conditions: terminal_status is one of NEEDS_REPAIR, BLOCKED, SHADOW_READY, FROZEN_PENDING_HUMAN, HUMAN_RELEASED
no status implies payment release, deploy, publish, send, account update, vendor-master update, or policy mutation
fail_conditions: manifest contains EXECUTED, DEPLOYED, SENT, PAYMENT_RELEASED, PUBLISHED, AUTO_RELEASED, or equivalent

tests.name: test_holobuild_artifact_manifest_forbids_execution_targets
pass_conditions: manifest has artifact_kind, candidate_path, review_mode, and release_state
manifest has no callable deploy target, payment endpoint, email-send target, or production mutation target
fail_conditions: artifact includes runnable production endpoint, deployment command, direct send command, or auto-execute flag

gates.name: Freeze requires explicit human approval
gates.goal: Freeze cannot occur solely because QA says CLEAN_TO_FREEZE.

tests.name: test_freeze_blocked_without_human_approval
tests.procedure: Call proposed freeze preflight validator only.
pass_conditions: validator returns FREEZE_BLOCKED_HUMAN_APPROVAL_REQUIRED
no ledger or frozen file is written
fail_conditions: freeze preflight returns ready
frozen artifact or ledger entry is written

tests.name: test_freeze_blocked_with_incomplete_approval
pass_conditions: missing field blocks freeze with specific reason
fail_conditions: incomplete approval is accepted

tests.name: test_freeze_preflight_allows_valid_approval_without_writing_ledger
tests.procedure: Run preflight without invoking ledger-mutating freeze.
pass_conditions: preflight returns FREEZE_PREFLIGHT_READY
no ledger or frozen file is written
fail_conditions: preflight mutates holo_builder/outputs/ledger.jsonl
preflight writes holo_builder/outputs/frozen/

gates.name: No autonomous deploy/release
gates.goal: Product surface cannot deploy, release, publish, send, or start live HoloBuild runs without explicit enablement and approval.

tests.name: test_holobuild_live_runs_disabled_by_default
pass_conditions: response status is 403
detail is HoloBuild live runs are disabled.
fail_conditions: run starts when env flag is unset

tests.name: test_holobuild_dashboard_mode_read_only_by_default
pass_conditions: mode equals read_only
live_runs_enabled is false
fail_conditions: dashboard reports live_watch by default

tests.name: test_no_release_keywords_in_safe_review_payload
tests.procedure: Scan command/action fields for release verbs.
pass_conditions: no command/action named deploy, publish, send, release_payment, update_vendor_master, merge, push, or execute
fail_conditions: safe review payload exposes autonomous release command

gates.name: Packet hash and freeze hash correctness
gates.status: EXPECTED_FAIL_UNTIL_FIXED for top-level action_boundary; MUST_PASS_NOW for legacy payment_email
gates.goal: Freeze hash must cover exactly model-visible content for the packet format.

tests.name: test_payment_email_freeze_hash_uses_payload_action_context
pass_conditions: computed hash equals freeze preflight hash
fail_conditions: hash includes hidden metadata or ignores model-visible payload

tests.name: test_action_boundary_freeze_hash_uses_top_level_action_context
pass_conditions: computed hash is non-empty
hash changes when top-level action or context changes
hash does not depend on absent payload wrapper
fail_conditions: hash is SHA-256 of empty action/context
hash ignores top-level action/context
hash changes when builder-only metadata changes

tests.name: test_freeze_hash_excludes_builder_metadata
tests.procedure: Compare hashes before and after hidden metadata mutation.
pass_conditions: hash remains unchanged when non-model-visible metadata changes
fail_conditions: metadata changes alter model-visible payload hash

gates.name: Top-level action_boundary packet format support
gates.status: MUST_PASS_NOW for lint; EXPECTED_FAIL_UNTIL_FIXED for freeze
gates.goal: Action-boundary packets using top-level action and context.documents are first-class across lint, preflight, freeze, and review packets.

tests.name: test_lint_accepts_valid_action_boundary_packet
pass_conditions: lint result has no errors
fail_conditions: valid top-level action_boundary packet is treated as legacy payload wrapper only

tests.name: test_lint_rejects_action_boundary_metadata_leak
tests.fixture: action_boundary packet with leaky model-visible fields
pass_conditions: lint errors identify leaky model-visible field
fail_conditions: expected_verdict, hypothesized_verdict, builder_approval, or builder_notes pass inside action/context

tests.name: test_action_boundary_requires_context_documents
tests.fixture: action_boundary packet with fewer than four context.documents
pass_conditions: lint fails with document-count error
fail_conditions: underspecified context.documents passes

tests.name: test_action_boundary_freeze_preflight_uses_top_level_shape
pass_conditions: freeze preflight sees top-level action/context
fail_conditions: freeze preflight requires payload.action/payload.context

gates.name: Missing holo_builder.assert_packet gap
gates.goal: System cannot claim active assertion-repair coverage when assertion module is absent.

tests.name: test_assert_packet_module_available_or_known_gap_declared
pass_conditions: module exists and exposes run_assertions
or readiness manifest declares assertion_gate_status known_gap_disabled and blocks live/release readiness
fail_conditions: module missing while readiness claims assertion_gate_status active

tests.name: test_no_live_readiness_when_assert_packet_missing
pass_conditions: if module missing, live_readiness is BLOCKED_ASSERT_PACKET_MISSING
fail_conditions: live readiness is READY, PASS, or release_approved while module missing

gates.name: Human reliance disclosure
gates.goal: Every review packet and design-partner display says what the user can and cannot rely on.

tests.name: test_review_packet_contains_non_execution_disclosure
pass_conditions: all required fields are present and true or non-empty
fail_conditions: review packet omits non-execution or human-review disclosure

tests.name: test_human_reliance_disclosure_blocks_release_when_missing
pass_conditions: release gate returns BLOCKED_RELIANCE_DISCLOSURE_MISSING
fail_conditions: release gate passes without disclosure

tests.name: test_disclosure_matches_mode
pass_conditions: shadow_only says no reliance
approved_for_review says human review still required
human_released names approving human and exact scope
fail_conditions: mode label implies release without approval

gates.name: Design partner safe review mode
gates.status: MUST_PASS_NOW for read-only/sanitized dashboard; SPEC_ONLY_NEW_GATE for full partner packet
gates.goal: Design partners can inspect HoloBuild safely without raw provider prompts, secrets, answer keys, draft bodies, or implied release status.

tests.name: test_holobuild_dashboard_sanitizes_raw_drafts
tests.fixture: dashboard payload with raw draft in source result
pass_conditions: serialized payload contains no raw draft body
serialized payload contains no _internal
serialized payload contains no builder answer key
serialized payload contains no provider credential shape
fail_conditions: draft or final_draft appears in design partner payload

tests.name: test_safe_review_mode_includes_trace_summary_not_raw_trace
tests.fixture: full run trace and safe review projection
tests.procedure: Compare source trace to safe projection.
pass_conditions: safe projection includes turn numbers, providers, model ids, token counts, elapsed ms, status, high-risk categories, and redacted findings
safe projection excludes raw prompt bodies and final candidate body unless approved for review
fail_conditions: safe projection leaks raw prompts, secrets, answer keys, or unapproved candidate body

tests.name: test_safe_review_mode_labels_shadow_state
pass_conditions: mode label is one of read_only, shadow_only, candidate, approved_for_review, human_released
fail_conditions: label says or implies production_ready, autonomous_ready, or released without human approval

gates.name: Trace and accounting requirements
gates.goal: Every HoloBuild packet has enough trace material to audit the run.

tests.name: test_run_manifest_has_required_trace_inventory
pass_conditions: manifest lists every required file with path, sha256, required flag, and visibility classification
fail_conditions: missing required file
missing hash
missing visibility classification

tests.name: test_runtime_accounting_complete
pass_conditions: required fields are present
numeric counts are integers
fallback_events and parse_errors are explicit lists even when empty
fail_conditions: required field absent
count has ambiguous type
fallback or parse error accounting omitted

tests.name: test_trace_inventory_hashes_match_files
tests.procedure: Recompute sha256 for every required trace file.
pass_conditions: all hashes match
fail_conditions: missing file
hash mismatch
unclassified visibility

gates.name: Failure preservation and regression-packet creation
gates.goal: Failures become durable evidence and regression work, not deleted noise.
required_failed_run_files: redacted trace snippets or trace hashes

tests.name: test_failed_run_preserves_failure_artifacts
pass_conditions: required failed-run files are present
proof_credit is false
release_state is blocked
all failure reasons are explicit
fail_conditions: failure missing
failure hidden by success summary
proof_credit granted to failed run

tests.name: test_regression_packet_created_for_gate_failure
tests.procedure: Feed failed gate result into proposed regression-packet builder.
pass_conditions: output includes regression_id, source_failure_id, gate_id, minimal_repro_fixture, expected_failure_reason, owner or assignee, and promotion_blocked_until
fail_conditions: failed gate creates no regression work item

tests.name: test_failure_preservation_does_not_freeze_or_judge
pass_conditions: provider_calls is 0 for preservation pass
freeze is false
judge is false
benchmark_credit is false
production_release is false
fail_conditions: failure preservation invokes provider, freeze, judge, leaderboard movement, or release

tests.name: test_failure_cannot_be_overwritten_by_later_success
tests.fixture: failed run followed by repaired run
pass_conditions: repaired run links back to failure id
original failure remains intact and visible
fail_conditions: later success overwrites or removes original failure evidence

non_execution_rules: Use fixture JSON and monkeypatched functions only.
Do not call run_builder, run_qa_attack, provider adapters, live web research, judges, deploy commands, or push commands.
Do not run holo_builder/builder.py freeze unless redirected to a temporary directory and unable to touch the real ledger.
Prefer a pure freeze_preflight validator before allowing any ledger-mutating freeze path.
Any test that intentionally models failure must set proof_credit=false.
Any test that creates a regression packet must write it to a test temp directory, not product or benchmark ledgers.
promotion_criteria: EXPECTED_FAIL_UNTIL_FIXED tests either pass after fixes or are explicitly blocked in readiness output.
Freeze preflight requires human approval and is packet-format-aware.
Missing assert_packet is resolved or the assertion gate is truthfully disabled and blocks live readiness.
Safe review mode shows trace/accounting and disclosure without raw secrets, answer keys, or implied release authority.
Failure preservation produces regression packets and never grants proof credit by itself.
